title: Smoky Fluffy Beef Stir-fry
description: A festive Chinese dish featuring Paleo-friendly beef cutlets marinated in a savory blend of spices and served with a side of veggies for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Marinate the beef cutlets in a mixture of chili paste, brown sugar, cumin seeds, black pepper corns, and sesame oil for at least 30 minutes.
Prepare vegetables such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms. Slice them thinly or dice them into small pieces.
Heat your wok or skillet over medium-high heat with a drizzle of olive oil.
Add the marinated beef cutlets to the pan, sear until golden brown on both sides (about 2 minutes per side).
Remove the beef and set aside. Add chopped scallions to the pan, stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
Return the beef to the wok, add paprika powder and garlic, and toss everything together for a few more seconds until heated through.
Serve with steamed or roasted Paleo-friendly vegetables on the side.
